nasb.text: “If, however, the mark breaks out again in the house after he has torn out the stones and scraped the house, and after it has been replastered,

esv.text: “If the disease breaks out again in the house, after he has taken out the stones and scraped the house and plastered it,

cnv.text: “如果挖出石頭，刮了房屋，粉刷了牆以後，病症再次在房屋裡出現，

ccb.text: “如果拆掉石块、刮掉灰泥、重新粉刷以后，霉斑再度出现并蔓延，
